name: Job Discovery & Tailoring Pipeline v3

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'automation_lock_acquire', runId: $json.runId, data: { runId: $json.runId, workflow: 'discovery_v3', slotId: $json.slotId, ttlSeconds: 14400 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'fetch_jobs_for_user', runId: $json.runId, data: { user: { userId: $json.userId, targetTitles: Array.isArray($json.user.targetTitles) ? $json.user.targetTitles : [], locations: Array.isArray($json.user.locations) ? $json.user.locations : [], remotePreference: $json.user.remotePreference || 'any', masterCvText: String($json.user.masterCvText || ''), subscriptionStatus: String($json.user.subscriptionStatus || 'free'), creditsRemaining: Number($json.user.creditsRemaining || 0) }, sourceConfig: { adzunaAppId: $json.config.adzunaAppId, adzunaAppKey: $json.config.adzunaAppKey, jsearchApiKey: $json.config.jsearchApiKey, joobleApiKey: $json.config.joobleApiKey, reedApiKey: $json.config.reedApiKey } } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5', max_tokens: 1400, temperature: 0, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.scoringPrompt }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2600, temperature: 0.1, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.tailorPrompt }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'new_applications', runId: $json.runId, data: { userId: $json.userId, applications: $json.applicationsFinal } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'automation_lock_release', runId: $json.runId, data: { runId: $json.runId, lockId: $json.lockId } }) }}

description: Additive v3 discovery workflow refactored to HTTP Request networking for app and Anthropic calls.
